prose: The signer points forward with an open pointing hand near the shoulder, palm down, fingertip forward. Short jab forward, once.

gaps.reason: 'open pointing hand' is ambiguous between an index (G / 1 handshape) and a flat hand used deictically; the two have different HamNoSys base codepoints
gaps.suggested_question: Is it a single index-finger point (index / G-hand) or a whole flat hand used to point (B-hand)?
